title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 21–24, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: No matter how mean that Butler is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: captain, I never thought you would make up lies to hurt others

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Lets go home!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah! Go home and eat dinner!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: wonder what's for dinner.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Because I used to lie all the time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No one believes a word I say now!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: even so... the fact that those pirates are going to attack,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Is the truth, right?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: They're definitely going to attack in the morning

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But no one believes me!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: They all think tomorrow will just be another peaceful day...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Since everyone that thinks I'm a liar

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'll protect this village myself and prevent the pirates from attacking!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: In order to protect the village,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Then this will just become one of my lies!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Although they... fired guns at me....

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And they chased after me with broomsticks... here... in the village where I grew up!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I love this village!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I want to protect everyone...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: How can I just watch...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Everyone get killed...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You are a pretty good guy, you lied to your crew so that you can do this alone...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Okay! I'm definitely going to butt-in this one!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But first things first, all their treasure is mine!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What...?

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
